error.generic: Could not save — please try again.
error.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.

login.title: Sign in
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.

forgotPassword.title: Password recovery
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.confirmation: If an account with this email exists, we've sent a password reset link to it.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.invalidToken: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in.

invite.title: You've been invited
invite.description: You've been invited to join project {projectName}.
invite.descriptionGeneric: Create a password to access your project.
invite.name: Full name
invite.alreadyUsed: This invite has already been used. Please sign in as usual.
invite.expired: This invite has expired. Ask your architect for a new one.

visibility.clientVisibleHint: Client can see this — click to hide
visibility.internalHint: Client can't see this — click to publish

fileTable.emptyDescription: Upload the first file by dropping it here or using the upload button.

chat.emptyDescription: Send the first message to start the conversation with the architect.

coverImagePicker.prompt: Drop an image here or click to choose

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create your first project to start tracking its progress.

emptyFiltered.title: No projects match this filter
emptyFiltered.description: Try changing the search or status filter.

wizard.title: New project

step1.title: Basic details
step1.name: Project name
step1.clientsHint: Add clients now or later from the project settings.

step2.title: Edit phases & tasks
step2.description: Uncheck any tasks this project doesn't need. Phases stay even if all their tasks are unchecked.

wizard.error: Could not create the project. Please try again.

tabsPlaceholder.tasks: This project's phases & tasks will be available soon.
tabsPlaceholder.files: This project's files will be available soon.
tabsPlaceholder.chat: This project's chat will be available soon.

general.name: Project name
general.archiveDescription: An archived project is read-only for the client and is hidden from their home after 90 days.
general.archiveConfirmDescription: The client will only have read-only access. You can undo this at any time.

members.title: Project members
members.name: Name
members.removeConfirmDescription: {name} will lose access to this project.
members.emailConflict: This email belongs to an existing admin account.

contacts.title: External contacts
contacts.name: Name
contacts.deleteConfirmDescription: {name} will be removed from the contacts list.
contacts.inUse: This contact is assigned to a task and cannot be deleted.
contacts.noContactsDescription: Add external specialists such as a structural engineer, surveyor, or building authority.

weights.title: Phase weights
weights.description: Weights determine how much each phase contributes to overall project progress. The total doesn't need to be exactly 100.

phases.title: Phases & Tasks
phases.name: Name

empty.title: No phases yet
empty.description: Add the project's first phase to start planning tasks.

phases.markDoneConfirmDescription: All tasks in this phase are complete. Do you want to mark the phase as done?
phases.deleteConfirmDescription: A phase can only be deleted when it has no tasks.
phases.deleteNotEmpty: The phase still has tasks — move or delete them first.

tasks.title: Title
tasks.milestoneHint: Highlight as a milestone on the client timeline
tasks.deleteConfirmDescription: A task that was ever visible to the client is only hidden, not permanently removed.
tasks.saveError: Could not save the task — please try again.
tasks.reorderError: Could not save the move — please try again.

empty.title: No tasks yet
empty.description: Add this phase's first task using the "Add task" button.

files.title: Files
files.emptyDescription: Drop files above or use the upload button to add the first one.
files.uploadRestricted: You can only upload files into the "From client" folder.
files.virtualizedNotice: Showing {count} files — list is virtualized for performance.

upload.dropPrompt: Drop files here or click to upload
upload.dropHint: Multiple files supported. Same name as an existing file creates a new version.
upload.success: {count, plural, one {# file uploaded} other {# files uploaded}}

preview.noPreview: No preview available for this file type.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save — please try again.
